REPLACE THIS FILE with the verbatim transcript (one sentence per line)
of en-clean-30s.wav once you have pinned a real source URL in fetch.py.

Test convention: jiwer is fed the file's whole contents (lower-cased,
whitespace-collapsed) as the reference. Punctuation outside word
boundaries is tolerated by jiwer's default normaliser, but contractions
should match the reader's actual delivery (e.g. write "don't" if she
says it, "do not" if she does not).

Example shape (delete this preamble before committing real text):

The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.
She sells seashells by the seashore.
